scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,miniapp -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w @pinory/api" "npm run dev -w @pinory/miniapp"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,miniapp,bot -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @pinory/api" "npm run dev -w @pinory/miniapp" "npm run dev -w @pinory/bot"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pinory/shared && npm run build -w @pinory/config && npm run build -w @pinory/api && npm run build -w @pinory/bot && npm run build -w @pinory/miniapp
